holdings.infoBox: FNDE is an equity ETF with a total of 395 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 6.45%, Hon Hai Precision Industry at 3.02%, Vale S.A. at 2.96%, China Construction Bank at 2.48%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 2.44%.

overview.description: The Schwab Fundamental Emerging Markets Equity ETF (FNDE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of emerging market stocks. Its selection and weighting are based on three fundamental factors: sales, cash flow, and dividends/buybacks. FNDE was launched on Aug 15, 2013 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

data.title: Schwab Asset Management Announces Index and Fund Name Changes to Its Fundamental Index ETF and Mutual Fund Family
data.text: WESTLAKE, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Schwab Asset Management®, the asset management arm of The Charles Schwab Corporation, today announced index and fund name changes for the Schwab Fundamental Index* ET...

data.title: 8 Funds to Consider if China's Efforts to Revive Economy Gain Traction
data.text: Investors have pulled back but stocks could take off if intensified steps to bolster the post-Covid-19 recovery pan out.

data.title: The 10 stock and bond funds with the biggest Russia exposure
data.text: A handful of stock and bond funds have above-average exposure to Russia. Some have taken big hits due to Western sanctions aimed at crippling Russia's economy.

data.title: 11 Best Dividend ETFs to Buy for a Diversified Portfolio
data.text: Are you a set-it-and-forget-it income investor? These 10 dividend ETFs provide a variety of long-term cash-generating strategies.

data.title: 10 Best Emerging Market ETFs for Global Growth
data.text: The global economy is expected to rebound sharply this year and next. These are the best emerging market ETFs to leverage this potential source of growth.

data.title: 10 Best Emerging Markets ETFs for a Global Rebound
data.text: Emerging markets ETFs can inject growth into your portfolio, as well as provide some much-needed diversification. Here are 10 top EM funds.
